N:=80;

        - x^2*(296010*x^49 - 80730*x^48 - 548470*x^47 + 1696370*x^46 - 793038*x^45 - 1180286*x^44 + 5517170*x^43 - 6173114*x^42 + 5653888*x^41 + 3187604*x^40 - 7790336*x^39 + 13730828*x^38 + 12272989*x^37 - 82014129*x^36 - 389021368*x^35 - 210458044*x^34 + 640219220*x^33 + 173938912*x^32 - 382557694*x^31 - 48388402*x^30 + 306861251*x^29 - 255205747*x^28 + 72918228*x^27 + 48286444*x^26 - 86789985*x^25 - 7032063*x^24 + 17819130*x^23 - 161831026*x^22 + 64383524*x^21 - 243428928*x^20 - 1847590*x^19 - 282475978*x^18 - 143230032*x^17 - 407803684*x^16 - 195723132*x^15 - 181873760*x^14 + 30605858*x^13 - 11340806*x^12 + 40520904*x^11 - 9384208*x^10+ 8231650*x^9 - 7348302*x^8 + 2029042*x^7 - 1622694*x^6 + 839990*x^5 - 237846*x^4 + 130796*x^3 - 59736*x^2 + 1995*x - 7315)*y^9
        - x^2*(80730*x^48 - 49140*x^47 - 62855*x^46 + 430716*x^45 - 476162*x^44 + 393804*x^43 + 554887*x^42 - 1173808*x^41 + 2211298*x^40 - 1422204*x^39 + 1065145*x^38 + 994964*x^37 + 2374706*x^36 - 13177872*x^35 - 122047114*x^34 - 42152640*x^33 + 132795352*x^32 + 50918668*x^31 - 101477214*x^30 + 23811664*x^29 + 33895554*x^28 - 49448212*x^27 + 21434675*x^26 + 3686248*x^25 - 34248358*x^24 + 30212836*x^23 - 49016039*x^22 + 22881500*x^21 - 50765734*x^20 + 9478440*x^19 - 59013126*x^18 - 3817896*x^17 - 71492590*x^16 - 37485208*x^15 - 66513585*x^14 - 8277748*x^13 - 12619244*x^12 + 9944008*x^11 - 1742375*x^10 + 3421296*x^9 - 1683740*x^8+ 594152*x^7 - 519988*x^6 + 193464*x^5 - 70272*x^4 + 40728*x^3 - 11405*x^2 + 2240*x - 1540)*y^8
        - x^2*(17550*x^47 - 17550*x^46 + 9503*x^45 + 66355*x^44 - 117392*x^43 + 198064*x^42 - 116109*x^41 + 34175*x^40 + 290312*x^39 - 474820*x^38 + 927524*x^37 - 1161424*x^36 + 2284226*x^35 - 4391842*x^34 - 27381633*x^33 - 11122773*x^32 + 26950698*x^31 + 8127666*x^30 - 19864388*x^29 + 9840740*x^28 + 55010*x^27 - 8221366*x^26 + 8067770*x^25 - 8707022*x^24 + 4722894*x^23 - 7294786*x^22 + 3585225*x^21 - 9217603*x^20 + 3768744*x^19 - 11128520*x^18 + 1656957*x^17 - 11176799*x^16 - 2246768*x^15 - 13080172*x^14 - 4553248*x^13 - 5141372*x^12 + 945544*x^11 - 427536*x^10 + 824544*x^9 - 213340*x^8 + 136198*x^7 - 101982*x^6 + 28710*x^5 - 15242*x^4 + 7520*x^3 - 1692*x^2 + 609*x - 231)*y^7
        - x^2*(2925*x^46 - 4212*x^45 + 6265*x^44 + 2486*x^43 - 11868*x^42 + 35800*x^41 - 46141*x^40 + 62410*x^39 - 35883*x^38 + 3632*x^37 + 109913*x^36 - 250734*x^35 + 564878*x^34 - 1041388*x^33 - 5011567*x^32 - 2752802*x^31 +5241055*x^30 + 107356*x^29 - 2438050*x^28 + 1992896*x^27 - 1368042*x^26 + 280132*x^25 - 423518*x^24 + 229432*x^23 - 1090415*x^22 + 839768*x^21 - 1709283*x^20 + 926734*x^19 - 1767166*x^18 + 523340*x^17 - 1614466*x^16 - 19376*x^15 - 1399152*x^14 - 845356*x^13 - 1143123*x^12 - 212598*x^11 - 126307*x^10 + 99024*x^9 + 462*x^8 + 20816*x^7 - 9876*x^6 + 1820*x^5 - 1982*x^4 + 736*x^3 - 149*x^2 + 84*x - 22)*y^6
        - x^2*(351*x^45 - 675*x^44 + 1425*x^43 - 1305*x^42 + 1158*x^41 + 1194*x^40 - 3511*x^39 + 8487*x^38 - 11161*x^37 + 14429*x^36 - 9030*x^35 - 2634*x^34 + 37189*x^33 - 96009*x^32 - 874894*x^31 - 398450*x^30 + 750688*x^29 -167272*x^28 - 110070*x^27 + 104926*x^26 - 65658*x^25 - 108630*x^24 + 144330*x^23 - 251446*x^22 + 186963*x^21 - 246127*x^20 + 122268*x^19 - 184936*x^18 + 33645*x^17 - 125821*x^16 - 43142*x^15 - 97966*x^14 - 75720*x^13 - 131040*x^12 - 85681*x^11 - 32963*x^10 - 1173*x^9 + 3917*x^8 + 2145*x^7 + 135*x^6 - 135*x^5 - 117*x^4 + 8*x^3 + 5*x - 1)*y^5
        - x^4*(27*x^42 - 66*x^41 + 171*x^40 - 276*x^39 + 459*x^38 - 570*x^37 + 730*x^36 - 700*x^35 + 710*x^34 - 480*x^33 + 487*x^32 - 536*x^31 + 1586*x^30 - 3756*x^29 - 126907*x^28 - 30884*x^27 + 62568*x^26 - 8736*x^25 - 23465*x^24 + 34616*x^23 - 42582*x^22 + 30628*x^21 - 27997*x^20 + 12420*x^19 - 12444*x^18 - 784*x^17 - 4844*x^16 - 5912*x^15 - 4360*x^14 - 6084*x^13 - 6460*x^12 - 6648*x^11 - 6057*x^10 - 10386*x^9 - 6402*x^8 - 2068*x^7 + 97*x^6 + 238*x^5 + 106*x^4 - 12*x^3 - 4*x^2 - 4*x + 1)*y^4
        - x^6*(x^39 - 3*x^38 + 9*x^37 - 19*x^36 + 39*x^35 - 69*x^34 + 119*x^33 - 189*x^32 + 294*x^31 - 434*x^30 + 630*x^29 - 882*x^28 + 1218*x^27 - 1638*x^26 - 11066*x^25 - 4730*x^24 + 7578*x^23 - 4830*x^22 + 2894*x^21 - 1770*x^20 + 442*x^19 - 506*x^18 - 111*x^17 - 371*x^16 - 160*x^15 - 372*x^14 - 287*x^13 - 247*x^12 - 486*x^11 - 170*x^10 - 515*x^9 - 351*x^8 - 297*x^7 - 633*x^6 - 324*x^5 - 88*x^4 + 19*x^3 + 7*x^2 + 3*x - 1)*y^3
        + x^8*(946*x^22 + 132*x^21 - 266*x^20 + 176*x^19 - 100*x^18 + 40*x^17 + 45*x^16 - 68*x^15 + 120*x^14 - 112*x^13 + 139*x^12 - 108*x^11 + 119*x^10 - 74*x^9 + 78*x^8 - 28*x^7 + 34*x^6 + 12*x^5 + 5*x^4 + 28*x^3 + 9*x^2 + 2*x - 1)*y^2
        + x^10*(44*x^19 + 4*x^18 - 8*x^17 + 8*x^16 - 8*x^15 + 8*x^14 - 7*x^13 + 7*x^12 - 6*x^11 + 6*x^10 - 5*x^9 + 5*x^8 - 4*x^7 + 4*x^6 - 3*x^5 + 3*x^4 - 2*x^3 + 2*x^2 - x + 1)*y
        + x^28;
q := (x*y - x + y + 1)/(x*y + x + y + 1);
t := (x*y - x + y + 1)/(x*y + x - y - 1);
E:=[1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P:=[(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
